verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Every move I make I make in You You make me move Jesus Every breath I take I breathe in You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Every step I take I take in You You are my way Jesus Every breath I take I breathe in You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Na na na na na Na na na na na Na na na na na Na na na na na

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Every move I make I make in You You make me move Jesus Every breath I take I breathe in You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Every step I take I take in You You are my way Jesus Every breath I take I breathe in You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Waves of mercy Waves of grace Everywhere I look I see Your face Your love has captured me Oh my God, this love How can it be?

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Na na na na na Na na na na na Na na na na na Na na na na na
